rationale: Review 1's findings about private BialgHom.map_antipode/Bialgebra.TensorProduct.map_id+map_comp (and antipode_comp), the rfl includeRight_apply duplicate, direct specializations like map_tmul/map_to*Hom/antipode_tmul, and their Mathlib counterparts are all directly visible in the diff and would materially improve reuse (make helpers public+upstreamable, drop no-op/specialized simp lemmas) if fixed; Review 2's 'no duplicates' approve leaves these untouched.
